name: DeShawn Carter
bio: Two-time Drew League MVP. Known for his explosive first step and clutch shooting.

name: Marcus Webb
bio: Floor general with elite court vision. Has guided three teams to championships.

name: Tyrone Jackson
bio: Dominant in the paint. College standout who returned to give back to the community.

name: Kevin Simmons
bio: Versatile wing player. Overseas pro who plays the Drew every summer.

name: Andre Williams
bio: Defensive anchor and rebounding machine. Community mentor off the court.

name: Damien Rhodes
bio: Crowd favorite known for deep threes and highlight-reel plays.

name: Isaiah Foster
bio: Pure point guard. Runs the offense like a maestro. Fan favorite.

name: Lorenzo Hayes
bio: Explosive scorer who can take over any game in the fourth quarter.

name: Dontae Collins
bio: Two-way player. As good on defense as he is on offense.

name: Raheem Stone
bio: Big with soft hands. Underrated passer for his size.

name: Jaylen Cross
bio: Electric with the ball. His handles draw crowds every game.

name: Treyvon Miles
bio: Defensive presence. Sets the tone with physicality and heart.
